# Byline

**Object**

The component for adding the publication date or contributor credits, especially for articles with multiple contributors.

## Declaration

```swift
object Byline
```

## Discussion

Use a `Byline` component to include the date and time of publication, specifying your local timezone, or to indicate more than one contributor to the article. A byline could include the word “by” or “from” as well as the contributors’ names as text. Components are also available for [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Illustrator], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Photographer], and [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Author] attributions.

### Example

```json
{
  "components": [
    {
      "role": "byline",
      "text": "by MICHAEL BURNS | October 25, 2015 | 11:15 AM",
      "layout": {
        "columnStart": 0,
        "columnSpan": 7,
        "margin": {
          "top": 20,
          "bottom": 10
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

## Text

- **Using HTML with Apple News Format**: Use HTML formatting for text components.
- **Using Markdown with Apple News Format**: Use Markdown formatting for text components.
- **Body**: The component for adding body text.
- **Title**: The component for adding an article title.
- **Heading**: The text component for adding a heading.
- **Intro**: The component for adding introductory text.
- **Caption**: The component for adding caption text.
- **Author**: The component for adding the name of the author.
- **Illustrator**: The component for adding illustrator credit.
- **Photographer**: The component for adding a photographer credit.
- **Quote**: The component for including a quote.
- **PullQuote**: The component for including a pull quote.
- **Text**: Properties shared by all text component types.

## Inherits From

- Text
